overall.description: A spacecraft flies low over snow-covered mountain peaks in a foggy, overcast environment. The third-person camera follows the ship as it banks and maneuvers along the ridgeline, showcasing the vehicle's thrusters and the winter terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered mountain ridge at high altitude

agents.ego_description: piloting a spacecraft low over the snow-covered terrain, maintaining a steady left bank along the mountain ridge with thrusters glowing

entered.detail: steep snow-covered mountain ridge with rocky outcrops, filling the lower portion of the frame
foggy distant mountain peaks visible on the horizon
grey overcast sky covering the upper portion of the scene

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of a spacecraft flying low over a snow-covered mountain ridge. The ship maintains a left bank as it follows the terrain, with distant foggy peaks visible in the overcast sky. The environment is desolate and wintry, with no signs of life or civilization.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered mountain ridge with visible valley drop-off

events.description: spacecraft transitions from left bank to right bank, shifting the camera perspective to show more of the ship's rear and the valley below

agents.ego_description: continuing to pilot the spacecraft along the mountain ridge, now banking right to navigate the terrain while maintaining low altitude

segments.scene_description: The spacecraft continues its flight along the mountain ridge, transitioning to a right bank that reveals more of the ship's rear thrusters and the steep valley dropping away to the right. The snowy terrain remains consistent as the ship adjusts its course along the ridgeline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement tracking a spacecraft as it maneuvers along a desolate, snow-covered mountain ridge under an overcast sky. It begins with the ship flying low and maintaining a left bank, gliding past distant foggy peaks in a wintry, lifeless environment. As the vessel continues its flight, the camera perspective shifts to follow a transition into a right bank, which reveals the glow of the rear thrusters. This movement opens the view to a steep valley dropping away to the right before the ship stabilizes its course along the jagged ridgeline.
